channel.title: Moloch on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Moloch on Compossible

item.title: Moloch for the Minotaur
item.description:
A fearful people

Can do such terrible things

They are so easily tempted

Frightened into

Wagering with Satan

And guaranteed

Damnation

The people of Canaan

(To appease

Great powers

Or avoid defeat)

Sacrificed

Their most innocent

Some say to Yahweh

A dreadful gift

No din of drums

Could ever drown

The sounds

Of children

Shrieking out

In their

Unbearable

Honour

And yet this cult

Can still be found

Even here in
